{{nihongo|'''Iso Shrine'''|磯神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Ise Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}}

== Japanese content ==
{{神社
| 名称 = Iso Shrine
| 画像 = {{画像募集中|cat=伊勢市}}
| 所在地 = {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Ise|Q328067|qid=Q328067|1=Ise, Mie}} Iso-chō 1069
| 位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
| 祭神 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu|1=UNKNOWN}}
| 神体 = 
| 社格 =  {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}、former {{ill|lt=district shrine|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}
| 創建 = 
| 本殿 = 
| 別名 = 
| 札所等 = 
| 例祭 = April 21
| 神事 = 
| 地図 = {{Location map|Japan Mie|label=磯神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=12|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}}
}}
'''Iso Shrine''' (いそじんじゃ) is a shrine enshrined in Iso-chō, {{ill|lt=Ise|Q328067|qid=Q328067|1=Ise, Mie}}, {{ill|lt=Mie Prefecture|Q128196|qid=Q128196|1=Mie Prefecture}}. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}} and its former rank was {{ill|lt=district shrine|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}}.

=== History ===
In the 25th year of {{ill|lt=Emperor Suinin|Q314850|qid=Q314850|1=Emperor Suinin}}, while {{ill|lt=Yamatohime no Mikoto|Q4388732|qid=Q4388732|1=Yamatohime-no-mikoto}} was traveling provinces in search of a site for Amaterasu's grand shrine, she stayed at Iso-no-miya; this is said to be the shrine's founding. It is one of the shrines identified with so-called {{ill|lt=Moto-Ise|Q11387775|qid=Q11387775|1=Moto-Ise Shrines}}.

=== Enshrined deities ===
* Main deity: {{ill|lt=Amaterasu|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu-sumasu-sumeramikami}}
* Side halls: {{ill|lt=Toyouke Ōkami|UNKNOWN|lt=Toyouke-hime-ōkami}}・{{ill|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime no Mikoto|UNKNOWN|lt=Konohanasakuya-hime no Kami}}<ref>{{Cite web|title=Iso Shrine official website|url=https://isojinja.com/|access-date=2025-12-5}}</ref>

=== Subsidiary shrines ===
* Kiyohama-sha（deity: {{ill|lt=Utsushi-kunitama no Kami|UNKNOWN|lt=Utsushi-kunitama no Kami}}）
* Hakusan-sha（deity: {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Kikuri-hime no Kami|1=UNKNOWN}}）
* Yama-sha（deity: {{ill|UNKNOWN|qid=Q386563|lt=Ōyamatsumi no Kami|1=Ōyamatsumi}}）<ref>{{Cite web|title=Mie Prefecture Shrine Office: Iso Shrine|url=http://kyoka.mie-jinjacho.or.jp/shrine/%e7%a3%af%e7%a5%9e%e7%a4%be/|access-date=2025-12-5}}</ref>
=== Annual festival ===
April 21

=== Related articles ===
*{{ill|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province|Q11378973|qid=Q11378973|1=List of Shikinaisha in Ise Province}}

=== Notes ===
